title: Tensura: Tempest Additions
description: A Tensura: Reincarnated addon. Adds non-lorewise features to the game.
body:
**Tempest Additions** is an addon for the **Tensura: Reincarnated **mod with the plan of adding multiple _non-canon_ and/or _non-lorewise _skills and races to the game.

**Currently, the mod features**:

- New playable Race, the Serpent, which evolves into the mighty World Serpent.
- New [Unique Skill] Elementalist
- New [Ultimate Skill] Kami, Lord of Spirits
 

This mod aims to provide the player with new content to immerse themselves in while they play through the base mod. I aim to include more skills and races that are not accurate to the official story of the _Tensura_ anime, and improve my own knowledge of the Java language in the meanwhile.

 

> **_Are you truly foolish enough to believe that you can control every element as you so please? Prove your worth or suffer the consequences, fool._**

 

**Notes**:

- Elementalist's and Kami's multipliers are configurable, as is whether [Ultimate Skills] (currently only Kami) should be obtainable.
